ddls:
CREATE TABLE "newsletters" (
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newsletter */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the newsletter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the newsletter */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the newsletter */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country-specific version of the newsletter */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the newsletter (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the newsletter (e.g., html, text) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the newsletter (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the newsletter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the newsletter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newsletter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscribers" (
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscriber */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the subscriber */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subscriber */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company of the subscriber */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the subscriber */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the subscriber */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the subscriber */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the subscriber */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscriber was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscriber was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscriber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscriber */,
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the newsletter */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was created */,
  "unsubscribe_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was cancelled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_subscriber_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscriber_id") REFERENCES subscribers ("subscriber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_newsletter_id FOREIGN KEY ("newsletter_id") REFERENCES newsletters ("newsletter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user behavior record */,
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscriber */,
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the newsletter */,
  "behavior_type" TEXT /* Type of user behavior (e.g., open, click, unsubscribe) */,
  "behavior_date" TEXT /* Date the user behavior occurred */,
  "link_clicked" TEXT /* Link clicked by the subscriber */,
  "link_clicked_date" TEXT /* Date the link was clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_subscriber_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscriber_id") REFERENCES subscribers ("subscriber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_newsletter_id FOREIGN KEY ("newsletter_id") REFERENCES newsletters ("newsletter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent record */,
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscriber */,
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the newsletter */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the consent was given */,
  "consent_type" TEXT /* Type of consent (e.g., newsletter, promotional emails) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consent_newsletter_id FOREIGN KEY ("newsletter_id") REFERENCES newsletters ("newsletter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consent_subscriber_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscriber_id") REFERENCES subscribers ("subscriber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newsletter_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content record */,
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the newsletter */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., article, image) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the newsletter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_newsletter_content_newsletter_id FOREIGN KEY ("newsletter_id") REFERENCES newsletters ("newsletter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL record */,
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the newsletter */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the newsletter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the URL was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the URL was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_newsletter_id FOREIGN KEY ("newsletter_id") REFERENCES newsletters ("newsletter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opens" (
  "open_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open record */,
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscriber */,
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the newsletter */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the newsletter was opened */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the subscriber */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device of the subscriber */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser of the subscriber */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opens_newsletter_id FOREIGN KEY ("newsletter_id") REFERENCES newsletters ("newsletter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opens_subscriber_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscriber_id") REFERENCES subscribers ("subscriber_id")
)
column_names: Category of the newsletter (e.g., technology, finance)
